about.hero.title: About Ryvenox Empire
about.hero.description: Ryvenox Empire is a competitive idle / clicker game where you start from nothing to build an AI startup capable of winning over thousands, then millions of users. Every click represents a decision, every upgrade speeds up your progress, and every player pursues the same goal: dominate the leaderboard.
about.vision.title: Our vision
about.vision.p1: We designed Ryvenox Empire to offer an experience that is easy to understand, yet difficult to master. The game is built around a strong idea: turning the growth of a startup into a fun, satisfying, and competitive progression loop.
about.vision.p2: The goal is not just to click quickly. It is about choosing the right upgrades, unlocking the best synergies, investing in automation at the right time, and surpassing other founders in a true race for growth.
about.unique.title: What makes the game unique
about.unique.intro: Ryvenox Empire combines several gameplay sensations into a single experience:
about.unique.item1: the immediate satisfaction of a clicker,
about.unique.item2: the constant progression typical of idle games,
about.unique.item3: the strategic thinking of upgrade systems,
about.unique.item4: the pressure of competition through the global leaderboard.
about.concept.title: The game concept
about.concept.p1: You begin as an unknown founder with an ambitious idea but very limited resources. Your mission is to attract your first users, strengthen your click power, generate revenue or passive gains, and then turn a small operation into a true technological empire.
about.concept.p2: As you progress, you will need to balance immediate power and long-term growth. Should you invest right away in a click boost to accelerate your momentum? Or is it better to bet on automation so you can keep progressing even when you are offline? These kinds of choices are what make each run engaging.
about.concept.p3: The leaderboard adds an essential layer to the experience. Each player does not progress alone in isolation: they take part in a competition where every gain matters. Seeing another founder pull ahead encourages you to come back, optimize, and try to reclaim your place.
about.highlights.fast.title: Start quickly
about.highlights.fast.description: The game is designed to be immediately understandable. You can begin in just a few seconds and very quickly feel the first effects of your progression.
about.highlights.optimize.title: Optimize intelligently
about.highlights.optimize.description: Behind its apparent simplicity, Ryvenox Empire rewards players who know how to anticipate, compare, invest at the right moment, and take full advantage of automation mechanics.
about.highlights.daily.title: Come back every day
about.highlights.daily.description: Between passive gains, competition, and constant progression, the game naturally encourages short but regular sessions.
about.theme.title: Why an AI startup universe?
about.theme.p1: The AI startup universe makes it possible to translate growth, scalability, and optimization mechanics into a simple, readable, and addictive format. The player intuitively understands the logic: acquire users, launch campaigns, improve performance, automate processes, and then accelerate even further.
about.theme.p2: This setting gives the game a strong identity. You are not simply clicking on an abstract counter: you are growing a digital company, expanding a user base, trying to beat other founders, and building something increasingly impressive.
about.ambition.title: Our ambition
about.ambition.p1: Our ambition is to keep evolving Ryvenox Empire over time with new mechanics, more upgrades, greater strategic depth, regular balancing, and an increasingly interesting competitive environment.
about.ambition.p2: We want to offer an accessible, smooth web game that makes players want to come back day after day, both for the pleasure of progressing and for the satisfaction of appearing among the top players on the leaderboard.
about.cta.title: Begin your ascent
about.cta.description: Every great empire starts with a first action. Launch your startup, recruit your first users, invest wisely, and see how far your strategy can take you.

home.hero.description: Start with nothing. Acquire users, unlock upgrades, automate your growth, and climb the leaderboard until your startup becomes unstoppable.

home.why.title: Easy to start. Hard to stop.
home.why.description: The thrill of growth, the satisfaction of automation, and the pressure of competition — all in one addictive startup simulator.
home.why.items.progress.description1: You grow more powerful every minute with stronger clicks, faster growth, and more impactful upgrades.
home.why.items.strategy.description2: Choose between immediate gains and long-term automation to optimize your startup’s dominance.
home.why.items.pressure.description3: Every gain matters when other founders are aiming for the same top spot.
home.why.items.progress.description4: Your startup explodes in power. Every upgrade accelerates everything, pushing you beyond your limits.
home.why.items.strategy.description5: Every choice impacts your empire. Investing at the right time makes all the difference.
home.why.items.pressure.description6: The leaderboard shows no mercy. Dominate or be left behind.
home.how.title: How It Works
home.how.description: From solo founder to global AI giant in three simple steps.
home.how.step1.title: Click to Grow
home.how.step1.description: Launch campaigns and bring in your first users. Small beginnings lead to massive growth.
home.how.step2.title: Upgrade & Automate
home.how.step2.description: Boost click power, unlock passive income, and turn your startup into a growth machine.
home.how.step3.title: Compete Globally
home.how.step3.description: Race up the leaderboard and build the startup everyone else is trying to catch.
home.guide.title: What makes this Ryvenox Empire game different?
home.guide.p1: This Ryvenox Empire game combines the fast satisfaction of an idle game with the long-term strategy of a business growth simulator. Instead of clicking aimlessly, players build a digital company from the ground up, acquire users, unlock automation, and make smart upgrade decisions to create a scalable growth engine. The result is a browser game that feels simple at first, but becomes much deeper as your startup expands.
home.guide.p2: Many incremental games focus only on bigger numbers. Here, progression is tied to a clearer fantasy: becoming the founder of a powerful AI empire. Every improvement has a purpose. More click power helps you grow faster in the early game, passive income rewards long-term planning, and the leaderboard adds a competitive layer that pushes players to refine their strategy. That balance between instant reward and optimization is what makes idle and clicker games so engaging.
home.guide.p3: For new players, the appeal is obvious: you can start in seconds, understand the core loop immediately, and still discover better ways to progress over time. For experienced players, the game offers a familiar but more thematic progression system built around startup growth, automation, user acquisition, and scaling. If you enjoy incremental games, idle games, startup simulators, or online leaderboard competition, this experience gives you several reasons to keep coming back.
home.guide.p4: The competitive element is also important. A live leaderboard transforms solo progression into a race. It is no longer only about unlocking the next upgrade, but about finding the most efficient path to growth and overtaking other players. That sense of pressure gives each decision more value. A well-timed upgrade, a better automation path, or a stronger early-game plan can make the difference between staying average and reaching the top founders.
home.guide.links.intro: Players who want to improve faster can explore the
home.guide.links.end: If you are ready to begin, you can
home.tips.title: Beginner tips to grow faster
home.tips.description: A few smart decisions early on can accelerate your progress and help you climb the rankings much faster.
home.tips.tip1.title: 1. Build momentum early
home.tips.tip1.description: In the beginning, active clicking matters a lot. Your first objective is to generate enough users quickly to unlock the first meaningful upgrades. A strong early start makes the mid-game smoother and gives you access to better scaling tools sooner.
home.tips.tip2.title: 2. Balance clicks and automation
home.tips.tip2.description: Do not focus only on raw click strength. Passive income and automation are what allow your startup to keep growing over time. The best strategy is usually a balanced one: enough manual power to progress now, and enough automation to scale later.
home.tips.tip3.title: 3. Watch the leaderboard
home.tips.tip3.description: The leaderboard is more than a vanity feature. It shows what is possible and gives you a concrete target. Competing against stronger players can help you stay motivated, refine your approach, and push for more efficient growth paths.
home.leaderboard.title: Top Players

home.faq.title: Frequently asked questions
home.faq.description: Quick answers for new players who want to understand the game faster.
home.faq.q1: Is this AI clicker game free to play?
home.faq.a1: Yes. New players can create an account and start building their startup for free. The core gameplay loop is designed to be accessible immediately, with progression based on smart decisions, active play, and automation upgrades.
home.faq.a2: The fastest way to improve is to combine strong early clicking with efficient upgrade timing. Focus on building momentum first, then invest in systems that continue generating users passively. Players who balance manual growth and automation usually scale better in the long run.
home.faq.q3: What is the goal of the game?
home.faq.a3: Your goal is to grow from a tiny startup into a dominant AI empire. That means generating more users, unlocking stronger upgrades, improving your production, and climbing the leaderboard ahead of other players.
home.faq.q4: Where can I learn the full rules?
home.faq.a4.middle: page for a more complete explanation of the gameplay systems, progression flow, and strategic advice. You can also browse the
home.finalCta.title: Ready to launch your AI startup?
home.finalCta.description: Build faster, scale smarter, automate growth, and compete for the top spot. Your empire starts with a single click.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Here you will find answers to the most common questions about how the game works, progression, user accounts, and the overall Ryvenox Empire experience.
faq.items.0.a: Ryvenox Empire is a competitive idle / clicker game where you build an AI startup. You click to gain users, unlock upgrades, automate your progress, and try to climb the global leaderboard.
faq.items.1.a: The game may be offered for free with direct browser access. Some features may evolve over time depending on the project's development.
faq.items.2.q: Do I need an account to play?
faq.items.2.a: Some features, such as progress saving, profile access, or participation in the leaderboard, may require creating an account.
faq.items.3.a: The best approach is to balance click power, automation, and regular returns to the game. A good upgrade strategy is often more important than click speed alone.
faq.items.4.a: The leaderboard lets you compare your progress with other players. It adds a competitive layer and encourages you to optimize your strategy.
faq.items.5.q: Can I progress while offline or away?
faq.items.5.a: Depending on the active mechanics in your session, you may generate users passively while away thanks to automation systems.
faq.items.6.a: The project is intended to evolve with new balancing updates, improvements, content, gameplay adjustments, and technical optimizations.
faq.items.7.q: How can I contact the site team?
faq.items.7.a: You can use the Contact page for any questions related to support, partnerships, technical reports, or general inquiries.
faq.tips.title: Best practices for progressing
faq.tips.paragraph1: Many players think that simply clicking nonstop is enough. In reality, progression also depends on the timing of your purchases, your ability to anticipate, and your consistency.
faq.tips.paragraph2: If you are just starting out, try to build a balance between immediate gains and automatic income. This will give you a stronger foundation over the long term.

intro.paragraph1: These general terms of use are intended to define the conditions for accessing and using the Ryvenox Empire website and game, as well as the rights and obligations of users.
intro.paragraph2: By accessing the website, creating an account, or using the available features, you fully and unreservedly accept these terms. If you do not accept these terms, you must stop using the website and its services.

service.title: 1. Purpose of the Service
service.paragraph1: Ryvenox Empire is an idle / clicker online game in which users build a virtual startup, generate users, unlock upgrades, automate their progression, and compare their performance through a leaderboard.
service.paragraph2: The website may also provide informational content, help pages, gameplay explanations, rankings, news, user account information, and, where applicable, advertising or promotional content.

access.title: 2. Access to the Website
access.paragraph1: Access to the website is in principle available to any user with a compatible internet connection. Some services may require account creation, authentication, or compliance with minimum technical requirements.
access.paragraph2: The publisher strives to ensure reasonable accessibility to the website but cannot guarantee permanent, continuous, and error-free availability. Access to the service may be suspended, limited, or interrupted at any time, particularly for maintenance, updates, technical fixes, or feature improvements.

account.title: 3. Account Creation
account.paragraph1: Some features of the website require the creation of a personal account. The user agrees to provide accurate, up-to-date, and complete information during registration.
account.paragraph2: The user is solely responsible for keeping their login credentials confidential and for the use of their account. Any activity carried out through the account is deemed to have been performed by the user, unless proven otherwise due to a malfunction attributable to the service.
account.paragraph3: In the event of unauthorized access, suspected compromise, or loss of credentials, the user must immediately take appropriate measures, including changing their password and contacting the publisher if necessary.

rules.title: 4. Rules of Use
rules.paragraph1: The user agrees to use the website fairly, for its intended purpose, and in compliance with applicable laws and regulations.
items: not disrupt the proper functioning of the service;
not attempt fraudulent access to systems, data, or other users’ accounts;
not use scripts, bots, exploits, automated programs, or other improper means to manipulate progression or rankings;
not bypass security, limitation, or protection mechanisms;
not publish, transmit, or distribute unlawful, abusive, fraudulent, or harmful content;
not infringe the intellectual property rights of the publisher or third parties.
rules.paragraph2: Any abusive, fraudulent, or game-spirit-violating use may result in moderation measures, restrictions, or account deletion, without prejudice to any additional action.

gameplay.title: 5. Gameplay, Balance, and Rankings
gameplay.paragraph1: Ryvenox Empire is based on mechanics involving progression, resource generation, upgrades, automation, and competition. The publisher reserves the right to modify the game’s parameters, values, balancing, progression speed, rewards, or ranking conditions at any time.
gameplay.paragraph2: Rankings are provided for informational purposes as part of competition and community engagement. The publisher does not guarantee the complete absence of errors, display delays, or temporary technical adjustments.
gameplay.paragraph3: In the event of cheating, exploit abuse, technical anomalies, or behavior compromising overall fairness, the publisher may correct data, adjust progression, remove a ranking position, or suspend an account.

intellectualProperty.title: 6. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.paragraph1: All elements present on the website, including texts, interfaces, graphics, logos, trademarks, visual elements, content, software components, original presentation mechanics, and more generally the structure of the service, are protected by intellectual property law.
intellectualProperty.paragraph2: Unless prior written authorization has been obtained, any reproduction, representation, adaptation, extraction, modification, distribution, or exploitation, in whole or in part, of any part of the website is prohibited.

personalData.title: 7. Personal Data
personalData.paragraph1: The methods of collection and processing of personal data are described in the website’s Privacy Policy. Users are invited to consult it in order to understand which data is processed, for what purposes, and according to which legal bases or practical arrangements.

ads.paragraph1: The website may display advertising content, notably through third-party partners. suspension.title: 10. Account Suspension or Deletion
suspension.paragraph1: The publisher reserves the right to suspend, restrict, or delete access to all or part of the service in the event of non-compliance with these terms, attempted fraud, behavior affecting the proper functioning of the website, or legal obligation.

intro.paragraph1: This privacy policy is intended to clearly inform you about how your data may be collected, used, stored, and protected when using the Ryvenox Empire website and game.
intro.paragraph2: We attach importance to the protection of your personal data and strive to limit collection to the information strictly necessary for the operation of the service, the improvement of the user experience, the security of the website, and, where applicable, the delivery of advertising content.

dataCollected.title: 1. Data That May Be Collected
dataCollected.paragraph1: Depending on how you use the website, we may process different categories of data, including:
items: account data, such as an email address;
technical data, such as IP address, browser, device type, or access logs;
data related to gameplay, such as your progression, scores, statistics, or leaderboard position;
audience measurement and browsing data;
data relating to consent or privacy preferences;
data from cookies or similar technologies, depending on your choices and the website configuration.

purposes.title: 2. Purposes of Processing
purposes.paragraph1: The data may be used for the following purposes:
items: to enable the creation and management of user accounts;
to ensure the operation of the game and the saving of progression;
to display leaderboards and competitive features;
to secure the website and detect abuse, fraud, or cheating;
to measure traffic and improve service performance;
to respond to contact or support requests;
to comply with legal obligations;
where applicable, to display advertising, measure its effectiveness, and adapt certain advertising content in accordance with applicable rules and consent choices.

legalBasis.title: 3. Legal Basis
legalBasis.paragraph1: Data processing may rely on different legal bases depending on its nature, including:
items: the performance of the service requested by the user;
the legitimate interest related to security, service improvement, and fraud prevention;
compliance with legal obligations;
consent, in particular where required for certain cookies or advertising-related processing.

cookies.title: 4. Cookies and Trackers
cookies.paragraph1: The website may use cookies or similar technologies to ensure proper operation, remember certain preferences, measure audience, improve user experience, and, where applicable, display advertising.
cookies.paragraph2: Some cookies may be strictly necessary for the technical functioning of the website. Others, particularly those related to audience measurement or personalized advertising, may require your consent under the regulations applicable in your country or geographic area.
cookies.paragraph3: You may manage your cookie preferences at any time through the tools made available on the website, when present, or through your browser settings.

ads.title: 5. Advertising and Google AdSense
ads.paragraph1: The website may use advertising partners, including Google AdSense, to display ads. These partners may use cookies or similar identifiers to serve advertising, limit ad repetition, measure performance, or, where authorized, personalize advertising content.
ads.paragraph2: Where applicable, users located in certain regions, including the European Economic Area, the United Kingdom, or Switzerland, may be offered a consent management mechanism to choose the use of certain advertising technologies.
ads.paragraph3: Third-party vendors, including Google, may use cookies to serve ads based on a user’s previous visits to this website or other websites.

recipients.title: 6. Data Recipients
recipients.paragraph1: Processed data may be accessible, to the extent necessary, to:
items: the website publisher and persons authorized to manage it;
technical service providers involved in hosting, databases, security, or the proper functioning of the service;
audience measurement providers;
advertising partners, subject to applicable settings;
administrative or judicial authorities where required by law.

retention.title: 7. Retention Period
retention.paragraph1: Data is retained for a period proportionate to its purpose. Some data may be kept as long as the account remains active. Other data may be deleted more quickly or archived for a longer period where necessary to comply with legal, accounting, tax, security, or evidentiary obligations.
retention.paragraph2: Cookies have a lifespan that varies depending on their nature. Preferences and consents may also be retained to demonstrate compliance with applicable obligations.

security.title: 8. Security
security.paragraph1: We implement reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect data against unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, loss, or destruction. However, as no system is completely infallible, absolute security cannot be guaranteed.

rights.title: 9. Your Rights
rights.paragraph1: Depending on the applicable regulations, you may have rights relating to your personal data, including:
items: right of access;
right to rectification;
right to erasure;
right to restriction;
right to object, where applicable;
right to data portability, where applicable;
right to withdraw your consent at any time for processing based on it.
rights.paragraph2: To exercise your rights, you may use the contact details indicated on the contact page or in the legal notice, attaching any useful information that may help process your request.

minors.title: 10. Minors’ Data
minors.paragraph1: The website is not intended to knowingly collect personal data from very young children without an appropriate legal framework. If you believe data has been provided inappropriately, you may contact the publisher so that verification can be carried out.

changes.title: 11. Policy Changes
changes.paragraph1: This privacy policy may be modified at any time to reflect technical, legal, or functional developments. The version published on the website is the one applicable at the time of your consultation.

footer.lastUpdate: Last update: to be completed according to the effective publication date.
